name: Salmon Loaf (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sprinkle lemon juice over salmon.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, combine milk, bread crumbs, eggs, onion, salt, pepper, and parsley flakes. Pour over salmon and blend well.
3. Pour the mixture into a greased, heat-resistant, non-metallic loaf pan.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 12 minutes.
5. Cool for 5 minutes. Place on serving platter.
